items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M14217/Perfect Match] This All In BB Tote interprets a vacation style with the leisurely elegance of Southern France, reaffirming the brand's exquisite craftsmanship. The raffia body incorporates iconic leather elements, while the bright lock adds a refined touch. The lightweight structure makes it an ideal choice for beach time and various occasions. 18 x 12 x 16 cm (H x W x D)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M15056] The Cookie BB Tote is crafted from Monogram coated canvas, featuring contrasting leather trim to highlight the crescent shape. The lightweight design combines an adjustable handle and a detachable chain, allowing for effortless conversion between shoulder and crossbody styles. Connect the ends of the tote to create a trendy wristlet look. 19 x 5 x 28.5 cm (H x W x D)

items.name_cn:
🌸 #Hobo# Large Raffia Bucket Bag
Summer's favorite raffia bucket bag!
Hawaiian style, the ultimate relaxed raffia bucket bag! Classic logo hook bucket shape paired with raffia weave, full of French lazy style. Can be carried by hand or on the shoulder, looks super nice on, instantly Instagram-worthy!
Model: 773991 Apricot Gold Weave
Size: 20x25x16CM

items.name_cn:
🔥 Raffia Weave Brown/Gold
The newly released Oxalis woven shoulder bag is the perfect choice for vacation and play. Made with raffia woven into a mesh texture, the cutout style creates a lightweight, see-through visual effect while adding a touch of sophistication! Paired with a double-layer leather shoulder strap, the iconic gold metal hardware in the center becomes the highlight 👍
Model: 781289 [Original Leather]
Size: 37x40x3cm

items.name_cn:
🌸 【No packaging for this size】Black/Antique Gold
The new BEA tote version in a horizontal style. It features a leather buckle closure and is embellished with LE CASSANDRE. It offers ample space with a matching suede lining, a main compartment, and an internal zip pocket. The internal drawstring design allows the sides to be folded or expanded as needed. The soft doe-skin BEA texture offers a rare, luxurious feel. The simple appearance combined with this softness creates a lazy, effortless look when worn. The sides can also be contracted, giving it two different forms 👑
Model: 763435 [White Gold Buckle]
Size: 50x28x18cm

items.name_cn:
🌸 YSL/4.3 Pochon
【No original packaging for this size】
Who hasn't bought Jamie's new Pochon bag yet!
Made of soft lambskin throughout, it feels great against the skin. The chain has a super metallic texture and can be tightened to create a drawstring bag silhouette, or left loose for a casual look. It comes with a detachable clutch to add practicality and convenience!
Style: 781666
Dimensions: 38x33x2cm
